name: Superheavy Samurai Brave Masurawo
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マスラ－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｏ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>オー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
This card can attack while in face-up Defense Position. If it does, apply its DEF for damage calculation. If a "Superheavy Samurai" monster(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 "Superheavy Samurai" card you control instead. Once per turn, if your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect (except during the Damage Step): You can draw until you have 3 cards in your hand.

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
